final:
module top_module(
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  B1  ,
    input  C1  ,
    output X   ,
    input  VPB ,
    input  VPWR,
    input  VGND,
    input  VNB
  wire temp1_(A1 & !A2) = (A1 & !A2);
  wire temp2_(B1 & C1) = (B1 & C1);
  assign X = temp1_(A1 & !A2) | temp2_(B1 & C1);

endmodule
